title: lupinus austrorientalis var. jujuyensis
intro: Lupinus austrorientalis var. jujuyensis, also known as Jujuy lupine, is a plant species in the genus Lupinus, belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jujuy lupine are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
